creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
A few more examples:

http://anonscm.debian.org/cgit/pkg-games/assaultcube.git/tree/debian/patches/use_system_ene.patch
http://anonscm.debian.org/cgit/pkg-games/redeclipse.git/tree/debian/patches/build-with-system-enet.patch

http://data.gpo.zugaina.org/sunrise/games-fps/assaultcube/files/assaultcube-1.1.0.4-QA.patch
http://data.gpo.zugaina.org/gamerlay/games-fps/redeclipse/redeclipse-1.4.ebuild
http://sources.gentoo.org/cgi-bin/viewvc.cgi/gentoo-x86/games-fps/sauerbraten/files/sauerbraten-2013.01.04-system-enet.patch?view=markup

I'll probably come up with patch(es) myself.
